mapper.select: SELECT MEMBERID AS memberId, NAME AS companyName, EMAIL AS email FROM TBL_MEMBER WHERE MEMBERID = #{memberId} AND STATUS = 1 AND TYPE = 1

SELECT c.FK_MEMBERID, c.COMPANY_NAME, c.BIZ_NO, c.INDUSTRY_CODE, DECODE(c.INDUSTRY_CODE, 'IT', 'IT·인터넷', 'SW', '소프트웨어', 'FIN', '금융·핀테크', 'EDU', '교육·에듀테크', 'MKT', '마케팅', 'ETC', '기타', c.INDUSTRY_CODE ) AS INDUSTRY_NAME, c.CEO_NAME, c.APPROVED_YN, c.APPROVAL_AT, c.REJECT_REASON, c.INFO_CREATED_AT, c.INFO_UPDATED_AT, c.ZIP_CODE, c.ADDR1, c.ADDR2, c.LAT, c.LNG,
ci.COMPANY_INTRO_ID, ci.INTRO_TEXT, ci.WELFARE_TEXT, ci.OPEN_DATE, ci.HOMEPAGE_URL, ci.VISION_TEXT, ci.COMPANY_TYPE, ci.CREATED_AT, ci.UPDATED_AT,
img.FILE_URL AS LOGO_PATH
FROM TBL_COMPANY c LEFT JOIN TBL_COMPANY_INTRO ci ON c.FK_MEMBERID = ci.FK_MEMBERID LEFT JOIN TBL_IMAGE_FILE img ON img.TARGET_ID = ci.COMPANY_INTRO_ID AND img.TARGET_TYPE = 'company' AND img.FILECATEGORY = 'logo' WHERE c.FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId}
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_COMPANY SET COMPANY_NAME = #{companyName}, BIZ_NO = #{bizNo}, INDUSTRY_CODE = #{industryCode}, CEO_NAME = #{ceoName}, INFO_UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId}
UPDATE TBL_COMPANY SET ZIP_CODE = #{zipCode}, ADDR1 = #{addr1}, ADDR2 = #{addr2}, INFO_UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COMPANY_INTRO ( COMPANY_INTRO_ID, FK_MEMBERID, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{companyIntroId}, #{memberId}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_COMPANY_INTRO SET HOMEPAGE_URL = #{homepageUrl}, OPEN_DATE = #{openDate, jdbcType=DATE}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COMPANY_INTRO ( COMPANY_INTRO_ID, FK_MEMBERID, HOMEPAGE_URL, OPEN_DATE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{companyIntroId}, #{memberId}, #{homepageUrl}, #{openDate, jdbcType=DATE}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_COMPANY_INTRO SET COMPANY_TYPE = #{companyType}, INTRO_TEXT = #{introText}, WELFARE_TEXT = #{welfareText}, VISION_TEXT = #{visionText}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COMPANY_INTRO ( COMPANY_INTRO_ID, FK_MEMBERID, COMPANY_TYPE, INTRO_TEXT, WELFARE_TEXT, VISION_TEXT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{companyIntroId}, #{memberId}, #{companyType}, #{introText}, #{welfareText}, #{visionText}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT FILE_ID, TARGET_ID, TARGET_TYPE, FILECATEGORY AS fileCategory, FILE_URL, CREATED_AT, ORIGINAL_FILENAME FROM TBL_IMAGE_FILE WHERE TARGET_ID = #{companyIntroId} AND TARGET_TYPE = 'company' AND FILECATEGORY = 'logo'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_IMAGE_FILE ( FILE_ID, TARGET_ID, TARGET_TYPE, FILECATEGORY, FILE_URL, CREATED_AT, ORIGINAL_FILENAME ) VALUES ( #{fileId}, #{targetId}, #{targetType}, #{fileCategory}, #{fileUrl}, SYSDATE, #{originalFilename} )
